mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER, BIRTH_DATE, PHONE, ADDRESS, DETAIL_ADDRESS, ROLE )
VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, 'USER' )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET PASSWORD = #{password}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, DETAIL_ADDRESS = #{detailAddress} WHERE NO = #{no}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER ORDER BY NO DESC
